task_completion.description: Verify the TitanicSurvival dataset is loaded into Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jamovi spreadsheet view containing the Titanic dataset, with visible columns such as 'passengerClass', 'survived', 'sex', and 'age'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Multinomial Logistic Regression analysis is initiated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Multinomial Logistic Regression' setup panel open on the left side of the Jamovi interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct variables are assigned to the dependent variable, factors, and covariates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis setup panel, 'passengerClass' must be in the 'Dependent Variable' box, 'survived' and 'sex' must be in the 'Factors' box, and 'age' must be in the 'Covariates' box.

task_completion.description: Verify the overall model test and pseudo R-squared measures are included in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Model Fit Measures' table showing R² (McFadden, Cox & Snell, Nagelkerke) and the 'Omnibus Likelihood Ratio Tests' table in the results pane on the right, OR the corresponding checkboxes selected in the setup panel on the left.

task_completion.description: Verify odds ratios are included for the model coefficients.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Odds Ratio' column in the 'Model Coefficients' table in the results pane, OR the 'Odds ratio' checkbox selected under the Model Coefficients section in the setup panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the analysis is saved to the correct file name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'MultinomialTitanic.omv' in the ~/Documents/Jamovi/ directory, or the Jamovi window title bar displaying 'MultinomialTitanic.omv'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Jamovi graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jamovi application window being actively used (mouse clicks, menus, variable dragging), not just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the results pane shows dynamically generated statistical tables.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane should display properly formatted Jamovi tables for Multinomial Logistic Regression that correspond to the Titanic dataset, rather than pasted text or mocked images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by using terminal commands to create or copy the .omv file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progression of screenshots should show the step-by-step setup of the analysis in Jamovi leading up to the save action, without sudden jumps where the file is created via command line.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv. The analysis must be a Multinomial Logistic Regression (logRegMulti). The dependent variable must be 'passengerClass'. The factors must be 'survived' and 'sex'. The covariate must be 'age'. The final output must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/MultinomialTitanic.omv.
